S.FORM: Nik Xhelilaj kawas tay 1983, ryax sa tay 5 nqu tay 3, Nik Xhelilaj, squliq na Bunge'. cinkhulan sa knita' sa brbiru' Lists of actors
S.PHON: nik xħelilaj kawas~ɕ taj ****, rjax s~ɕa taj * nqu taj *, nik xħelilaj, s~ɕquliq na βuŋeʔ. ʦ~ʨinkħulan s~ɕa knitaʔ s~ɕa βrβiruʔ lis~ɕts~ɕ o* aʦ~ʨtors~ɕ

S.PHON: nik xħelilaj kawas~ɕ taj ****, rjax s~ɕa taj * nqu taj *, nik xħelilaj, s~ɕquliq na βuŋeʔ. ʦ~ʨinkħulan s~ɕa knitaʔ s~ɕa βrβiruʔ lis~ɕts~ɕ o* aʦ~ʨtors~ɕ
